component.name: Clawdmeter
component.summary: Live rate-limit gauges and $/token analytics for Claude Code + Codex CLI

description.p: Clawdmeter shows your Claude Code and Codex CLI usage as a live gauge in the GNOME top bar, plus a dashboard with historical token spend analytics (Today / Past 7d / Past 30d / All time, per repo).

ul.li: Live menu-bar gauge for both providers, updated every 60 seconds
Dashboard with totals grid + daily-spend chart + by-repo breakdown
Sessions chat IDE — paste prompts, see plans, approve diffs, merge PRs
iPhone pairing over Tailscale — control sessions from your phone

description.p: Initial Linux release. Ubuntu 24.04+ and ZorinOS 17+ supported.
